title: The Two Horses of Genghis Khan
original_title: Das Lied von den zwei Pferden
overview: An old, broken morin khurr (horse head fiddle) compels renowned Mongolian singer Urna Chahar Tugchi to take a road journey to Ulan Bator and the steppes of Mongolia.
